goal: Fix all ~120 broken CLI calls in markdown — add missing flags and subcommands to Go CLI so pheromones, learning, midden, spawn tracking, activity log, flags, and registry actually work

learnings.claim: Aether CLI commands silently ignore positional args when flags are required - grep for positional usage in markdown to find all broken calls
learnings.evidence: 226 broken calls found via grep inventory matching Go CLI source verification

learnings.claim: spawn-log and spawn-complete both use cobra.NoArgs — positional args silently fail. Adding --summary to spawn-complete required updating both the CLI flag and the spawn tree persistence layer with backward-compatible parsing.
learnings.evidence: 62 broken calls fixed across 29 files, 6 new Go tests pass, Watcher verified zero remaining broken patterns

learnings.claim: activity-log positional args silently ignored — all 48 markdown files converted to --command/--details flags with source+details merged into --details field
learnings.evidence: 0 positional calls remain, 78 flag-based calls verified, all Go tests pass

learnings.claim: Midden-write calls were already fixed during prior phases — the broad markdown sweep for activity-log and spawn-log also covered midden-write files. grep confirms zero positional midden-write calls remain.
learnings.evidence: 0 positional midden-write calls found via grep across all .md files; all use --category/--message/--source flags

learnings.claim: pheromone-write used cobra.NoArgs so positional type/content args silently failed. Added --source/--reason/--ttl flags to Go with TTL parsing (Nd/Nh/Nw format). All 12 positional calls across 6 markdown files converted to --type/--content flags. Init.md files were missed by builder but caught by Watcher.
learnings.evidence: 54 pheromone tests pass, zero positional calls remain, all 3 new flags work
